_comment: Ground truth for the DFRWS 2008 Forensic Challenge (Linux intrusion).
Tier: YELLOW (build/test, score with care). Memory + disk + network, all in-repo.
Anna built a VIGIA/ground-truth file for this case; this golden mirrors its core
claims. Scenario: compromised Linux host abused for admin-share theft and used as
a proxy to relay exfiltration traffic.
license: DFRWS Forensic Challenge — public for research/education

findings.description: Unauthorized access to the host using compromised credentials / admin share
Proxy software used to relay traffic for exfiltration
Suspicious process resident in memory acting as the relay
findings.artifact_hint: Linux memory process list; listening relay process

findings.description: Data staged and transferred off the host
findings.artifact_hint: Outbound transfer volume in pcap correlated to disk staging

findings.description: Log tampering or cleared records consistent with anti-forensics
